zh.Aldingham, Cumbria, England: 英國英格蘭恩布利亞阿爾迪加姆
zh.Aldingham, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Fleming於1219年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆時，他的父親Michael Fleming34歲，母親Agatha FitzHenry19歲。他於大約1237年與Eleanor在英國英格蘭恩布利亞阿爾迪加姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1278年在英國藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆享年59歲。

zh-hans.Aldingham, Cumbria, England: 英国英格兰恩布利亞阿爾迪加姆
zh-hans.Aldingham, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Fleming于1219年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆时，他的父亲Michael Fleming34岁，母亲Agatha FitzHenry19岁。他于大约1237年与Eleanor在英国英格兰恩布利亞阿爾迪加姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1278年在英国藍卡爾阿爾迪加姆享年59岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fleming
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, from Middle English fleming. The word reflects a Norman French form of Old French flamanc ‘Fleming’, from the stem flam- + the ancient Germanic suffix -ing. In the Middle Ages there was considerable commercial intercourse between England and the Netherlands, particularly in the wool trade, and many Flemish weavers and dyers settled in England. This surname is also common in south and east Scotland and in Ireland, where it is sometimes found in the Gaelicized form Pléamonn.
German: variant of   Flemming  , cognate with 1 above.

variants.name: Flemings
meanings: Americanized form of Flemish Vleminckx: patronymic from Vleminck, an ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle Dutch vleminc.

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

variants.name: Flemming
meanings: German: ethnic name for someone from Flanders, Middle High German vlaeminc. People from Flanders spread throughout Germany, as well as England, in the Middle Ages as clothmakers and dyers.

variants.name: Flamenco
meanings: Spanish: ethnic name from flamenco ‘Fleming, Flemish person’ (see Fleming ).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When William Fleming was born in 1219, in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Michael Fleming, was 34 and his mother, Agatha FitzHenry, was 19. He married Eleanor about 1237, in Aldingham, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1278, in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, at the age of 59.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Fleming est né en 1219, à Aldingham, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Michael Fleming, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Agatha FitzHenry, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Eleanor environ 1237, à Aldingham, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1278, à Aldingham, Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 59 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Fleming 1219 in Aldingham, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Michael Fleming 34 und seine Mutter Agatha FitzHenry 19. Er hat um 1237 in Aldingham, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom Eleanor geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1278 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Aldingham, Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Fleming è nato il nel 1219 nel Aldingham, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Michael Fleming, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Agatha FitzHenry, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Eleanor circa 1237, nel Aldingham, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1278, nel Aldingham, Lancashire, England, all'età di 59 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Flemingが1219年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアアルディンガムで生まれた時，父Michael Flemingは34歳，母Agatha FitzHenryは19歳であった。約1237年にイギリスイギリスクウンブリアアルディンガムでEleanorと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1278年にイギリスランカシュアイアアルディンガムで59歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Fleming(이)가 1219년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 알딩함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Michael Fleming(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Agatha FitzHenry(은)는 19세였다. 그는 대략 1237년 영국 잉글랜드 c브리아 알딩함에서 Eleanor(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1278년 영국 랭카실르 알딩함에서 59세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Fleming родился в 1219 г. в местности алдингхам, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Michael Fleming было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha FitzHenry, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Eleanor около 1237 г. в местности алдингхам, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1278 г. в местности алдингхам, ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 59 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Fleming nació en 1219, en Aldingham, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Michael Fleming, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Agatha FitzHenry, tenía 19 años.
